name: 鲍伊猎刀（★） | 枯焦之色
nameZh: 鲍伊猎刀（★） | 枯焦之色
descriptionEn: This full-tang sawback Bowie knife is designed for heavy use in brutal survival situations. It has been spray-painted in a sun-dappled pattern. The Phoenix is not a symbol of destruction... it's a symbol of rebirth - Valeria Jenner, Revolutionary
descriptionZh: 这把全龙骨锯齿的鲍伊猎刀是专为在残酷的生存环境中大量使用而设计的。 这把武器被漆上了阳光斑驳图案。 “凤凰”不是毁灭的象征… 恰恰相反，它象征着重生 - 革命者瓦莱里娅.琴纳
